player_text.trigger_body: Alya needs to clear the warehouse fast. Today's haul is bigger and the clock is tighter.
player_text.changed_rules: Morning batch is larger; the day passes 25% faster while the rush lasts.
player_text.consequences: More scrap to triage, less real time to decide.

items.accessibility_caption: Rush delivery active: extra batch and faster clock.

player_text.trigger_body: The district power flickers and dies. The shop is running on dim emergency lights.
player_text.changed_rules: Electric tools and the phone marketplace are unavailable until power returns.
player_text.consequences: Restoration is slower in the gloom; online sales pause.

items.accessibility_caption: Brownout: electric tools and marketplace offline for a few hours.

outcome_params.reward_clue: A neighbor remembers your uncle asking about old santo figures.

player_text.trigger_body: A neighbor left a note: restore this small santo and they'll pay well.
player_text.changed_rules: A request item is added to today's inventory. Restore and judge it to collect the reward.
player_text.consequences: Success pays cash and adds a local lead.

items.accessibility_caption: Community request added: restore the santo before the day ends.

fallback_content.trigger_body: Someone asked for a restoration favor.
fallback_content.changed_rules: A request item appears in today's delivery.

player_text.trigger_body: A dusty locket arrived with mismatched hinges and a too-clean clasp. Something feels off.
player_text.changed_rules: Scanner confidence is lower for this piece; trust your judgment over the AI readout.
player_text.consequences: Spotting the fake pays a bonus; calling it genuine does not.

items.accessibility_caption: Suspicious antique: scanner is uncertain; judge carefully.

player_text.trigger_body: Esperanza Vega is in town and has extra cash for the right piece.
player_text.changed_rules: A high-budget collector is available immediately on the Marketplace today.
player_text.consequences: List a quality restored piece before the day ends.

items.accessibility_caption: Rare buyer alert: a well-funded collector is browsing today.

fallback_content.trigger_body: A rare buyer is looking for pieces today.
fallback_content.consequences: Sell a restored piece for extra profit.

player_text.trigger_body: A sealed tin with no return address was tucked into the morning haul.
player_text.changed_rules: One extra mystery item appears in today's delivery.
player_text.consequences: Open it to see what's inside — it could be junk, an echo, or a hidden find.

items.accessibility_caption: Mystery box added: one sealed tin in today's delivery.

fallback_content.consequences: Open it to discover the contents.

player_text.trigger_body: A leak from the louvers is dripping onto the workbench. Everything is damp and slow.
player_text.changed_rules: Restoration progress is slower; incoming deliveries carry extra water stains; shipments may be delayed.
player_text.consequences: Work carefully — the damp worsens until the rain passes.

items.accessibility_caption: Rainy-day leak: restoration slowed, deliveries wetter, shipments delayed.

fallback_content.trigger_body: A leak is making the shop damp.
fallback_content.consequences: Wait for the rain to pass.

player_text.trigger_body: One of your tools finally gave out with a sharp crack.
player_text.changed_rules: A non-essential owned tool breaks immediately.
player_text.consequences: Repair or replace it through the Marketplace; the tool is removed from your loadout.

items.accessibility_caption: Tool breakdown: one owned tool has broken.

fallback_content.consequences: Buy or replace it to keep working.
